  white-space:nowrap; font-size:.72rem; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:.03em;
  background:#04060f; color:#cbd5e1; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:9px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  opacity:0; pointer-events:none; transition:opacity .2s, transform .2s; box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
}
.nx-dock-btn:hover::after{ opacity:1; transform:translateY(-50%) translateX(0); }
.nx-dock-dot{ position:absolute; top:-3px; right:-3px; width:12px; height:12px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid #04060f; background:#f59e0b; box-shadow:0 0 8px #f59e0b; }
.nx-dock-dot.ok{ background:#10b981; box-shadow:0 0 8px #10b981; }
@media (max-width:768px){
  .nx-dock{ right:50%; top:auto; bottom:14px; transform:translateX(50%); flex-direction:row; }
  .nx-dock-btn::after{ right:50%; top:auto; bottom:118%; transform:translateX(50%) translateY(6px); }
  .nx-dock-btn:hover::after{ transform:translateX(50%) translateY(0); }
}

/* ── Modales NX ── */
.nx-modal{ position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9998; display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:18px;
  background:radial-gradient(80% 80% at 50% 28%, rgba(2,4,12,.78), rgba(2,4,12,.93)); backdrop-filter:blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px); }
.nx-modal.show{ display:flex; animation:nxFade .25s ease; }
@keyframes nxFade{ from{opacity:0} to{opacity:1} }
.nx-card{ width:100%; max-width:560px; max-height:88vh; overflow:auto; border-radius:22px; padding:22px 22px 20px; position:relative;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,15,30,.97), rgba(6,9,20,.97)); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10); border-top:2px solid var(--neon-primary);
  box-shadow:0 40px 90px -10px rgba(0,0,0,.95), 0 0 56px -12px var(--neon-primary); animation:nxRise .35s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); }
.nx-card.wide{ max-width:900px; }
@keyframes nxRise{ from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px) scale(.98)} to{opacity:1; transform:none} }
.nx-head{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:6px; }
.nx-title{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:800; color:#f8fafc; letter-spacing:.01em; }
.nx-title i{ width:20px; height:20px; color:var(--neon-primary); }
.nx-close{ width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:10px; display:grid; place-items:center; cursor:pointer; color:#94a3b8; background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); transition:.2s; }
.nx-close:hover{ color:#fff; background:rgba(244,63,94,.18); border-color:rgba(244,63,94,.4); }
.nx-close i{ width:18px; height:18px; }
.nx-note{ font-size:.78rem; line-height:1.5; color:#94a3b8; margin:4px 0 14px; }
.nx-note b{ color:#cbd5e1; font-weight:700; }
.nx-label{ font-size:.68rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.09em; color:#7891b3; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; margin:14px 0 7px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.nx-link{ color:var(--neon-primary); text-decoration:none; font-size:.66rem; text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; opacity:.9; }
.nx-link:hover{ text-decoration:underline; opacity:1; }
.nx-field{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background:rgba(2,6,18,.7); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-radius:13px; padding:0 12px; transition:border-color .25s, box-shadow .25s; }
.nx-field:focus-within{ border-color:var(--neon-primary); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--neon-primary) 22%, transparent); }
.nx-field > i{ width:17px; height:17px; color:#64748b; flex:0 0 auto; }
.nx-input{ flex:1; background:transparent; border:none; outline:none; color:#e2e8f0; font-size:.86rem; padding:12px 0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; width:100%; }
.nx-input::placeholder{ color:#475569; }
select.nx-input.nx-select{ padding:12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-radius:13px; background:rgba(2,6,18,.7); cursor:pointer; font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; }
.nx-eye{ background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:#64748b; display:grid; place-items:center; padding:4px; }
.nx-eye:hover{ color:#cbd5e1; }
.nx-eye i{ width:17px; height:17px; }
.nx-seg{ display:flex; gap:6px; background:rgba(2,6,18,.6); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius:13px; padding:5px; }
.nx-seg button{ flex:1; padding:9px 8px; border-radius:9px; border:none; cursor:pointer; background:transparent; color:#94a3b8; font-size:.74rem; font-weight:700; transition:.2s; font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; }
.nx-seg button:hover{ color:#e2e8f0; }
.nx-seg button.on{ background:linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in oklab,var(--neon-primary) 28%, transparent), color-mix(in oklab,var(--neon-secondary) 28%, transparent)); color:#fff; box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklab,var(--neon-primary) 45%, transparent); }
.nx-acc{ margin:14px 0 4px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius:13px; padding:0 14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
.nx-acc summary{ cursor:pointer; padding:13px 0; color:#cbd5e1; font-size:.82rem; font-weight:700; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; list-style:none; }
.nx-acc summary::-webkit-details-marker{ display:none; }
.nx-acc summary i{ width:16px; height:16px; color:var(--neon-secondary); }
.nx-acc[open] summary{ border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06); margin-bottom:10px; }
.nx-actions{ display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:18px; }
.nx-btn{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:11px 16px; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; font-size:.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#dbeafe; background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); transition:.22s; font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif; }
.nx-btn:hover{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-color:var(--neon-primary); color:#fff; transform:translateY(-1px); }
.nx-btn i{ width:16px; height:16px; }
.nx-btn-primary{ background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--neon-primary), var(--neon-secondary)); color:#04060f; border:none; box-shadow:0 10px 26px -8px var(--neon-primary); }
.nx-btn-primary:hover{ color:#04060f; filter:brightness(1.08); box-shadow:0 14px 32px -8px var(--neon-primary); }
.nx-result{ display:none; margin-top:14px; padding:11px 13px; border-radius:11px; font-size:.78rem; line-height:1.5; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); background:rgba(255,255,255,.03); color:#cbd5e1; word-break:break-word; }
.nx-result.show{ display:block; animation:nxFade .25s ease; }
.nx-result.ok{ border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.4); background:rgba(16,185,129,.08); color:#a7f3d0; }
.nx-result.warn{ border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.4); background:rgba(245,158,11,.08); color:#fcd34d; }
.nx-result.err{ border-color:rgba(244,63,94,.4); background:rgba(244,63,94,.08); color:#fda4af; }

/* ── Sensores ── */
.nx-perm{ display:flex; gap:9px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin:6px 0 16px; }
.nx-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr)); gap:12px; }
.nx-sensor{ border-radius:16px; padding:14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.03); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); position:relative; overflow:hidden; transition:border-color .25s, transform .25s; }
.nx-sensor:hover{ border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.14); transform:translateY(-2px); }
.nx-sensor::before{ content:""; position:absolute; left:0; top:0; height:100%; width:3px; background:linear-gradient(var(--neon-primary),var(--neon-secondary)); opacity:.7; }
.nx-sensor h4{ font-size:.64rem; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#94a3b8; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:9px; }
.nx-sensor h4 i{ width:14px; height:14px; color:var(--neon-primary); }
.nx-sensor .val{ font-size:1.12rem; font-weight:800; color:#f1f5f9; line-height:1.18; word-break:break-word; }
.nx-sensor .sub{ font-size:.68rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:3px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; word-break:break-word; }
.nx-bar{ height:6px; border-radius:99px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); margin-top:10px; overflow:hidden; }
.nx-bar>span{ display:block; height:100%; width:0; border-radius:99px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--neon-primary),var(--neon-secondary)); transition:width .25s ease; }

/* ── Lab Python ── */
.nx-code{ width:100%; min-height:190px; resize:vertical; border-radius:14px; padding:14px; margin-top:6px; color:#e2e8f0;
  background:#02060f; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); outline:none; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.82rem; line-height:1.55; tab-size:4; }
.nx-code:focus{ border-color:var(--neon-primary); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab,var(--neon-primary) 18%, transparent); }
.nx-pystatus{ font-size:.72rem; color:#7891b3; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; align-self:center; }
.nx-pyout{ margin-top:14px; min-height:60px; max-height:300px; overflow:auto; border-radius:13px; padding:13px 14px; white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-word;
  background:#01040b; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); color:#a7f3d0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.8rem; line-height:1.5; }

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ✦ RESPONSIVE GLOBAL — Adaptación total a móvil y tablet ✦
   Garantiza que en el teléfono se vea igual de bien que en el
   ordenador: sin desbordes horizontales, menús adaptados,
   tipografías y rejillas escaladas.
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Evita cualquier desbordamiento horizontal en toda la página */
html, body { max-width: 100vw; overflow-x: hidden; }
img, svg, video, canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }
main, header, footer, section { max-width: 100%; }

/* ── TABLET y MÓVIL (≤ 1024px) ── */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    /* El menú de proyectos deja de tener ancho fijo gigante */
    .projects-dropdown {
        width: min(92vw, 620px) !important;
        max-width: 92vw !important;
        padding: 18px !important;
    }
}

/* ── MÓVIL (≤ 768px) ── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    body { padding: 12px !important; }

    /* Cabecera: apila el logo y los controles, centrados */
    .cyber-header { top: 10px; }
    .cyber-header > .glass-panel {
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 12px;
        justify-content: center !important;
        padding: 16px !important;
        border-radius: 20px;
    }

    /* Menú de proyectos a pantalla casi completa y centrado */
    .projects-dropdown {
        position: fixed !important;
        top: auto !important;
        left: 50% !important;
        right: auto !important;
        bottom: 12px !important;
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px) scale(0.98) !important;
        width: 94vw !important;
        max-width: 94vw !important;
        max-height: 70vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .projects-trigger-container:hover .projects-dropdown,
    .projects-trigger-container.active-mobile .projects-dropdown {
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0) scale(1) !important;
    }
    .projects-dropdown .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important; }
    .project-menu-card[style*="span 2"] { grid-column: span 2 !important; }

    /* Tipografías del hero más compactas */
    .identity-cta { padding: 1.8rem 1rem !important; }

    /* Modales ocupan casi toda la pantalla */
    .nx-card, .auth-modal { max-width: 94vw !important; }
    .nx-card.wide { max-width: 94vw !important; }

    /* El dock flotante no tapa el contenido (ya pasa a barra inferior) */
    main { padding-bottom: 90px !important; }

    /* Reduce blur en móvil para mejor rendimiento sin perder el glass */
    .glass-panel, .liquid-glass, .lq {
        backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(170%) !important;
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(170%) !important;
    }
}

/* ── MÓVIL PEQUEÑO (≤ 480px) ── */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    body { padding: 8px !important; }

    .cyber-header > .glass-panel { padding: 14px !important; }

    /* Las métricas a una sola columna ancha si hace falta */
    .projects-dropdown .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .project-menu-card[style*="span 2"] { grid-column: span 1 !important; }

    /* Botones del header con texto más pequeño */
    .cyber-header button { font-size: 0.8rem !important; padding: 0.6rem 0.9rem !important; }

    /* Padding interno de paneles reducido */
    .glass-panel { border-radius: 18px; }
}

/* Mejora del scroll táctil */
@media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
    .glass-panel:hover, .liquid-glass:hover, .lq:hover { transform: none; }
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ✦ COMPARATIVA DE DIAGNÓSTICO — PC antiguo vs Setup 2.0 ✦
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.cmp-wrap { position: relative; border-radius: 22px; overflow: hidden; }
.cmp-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 1.55fr 1.6fr; }
.cmp-head-cell {
    padding: 16px 18px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
}
.cmp-head-cat { color: #64748b; }
.cmp-head-old { color: #fb7185; background: rgba(244,63,94,0.05); }
.cmp-head-new { color: #34d399; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.07); }
.cmp-cell {
    padding: 15px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.045);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.45;
}
.cmp-cat {
    flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: 9px;
    font-weight: 700; color: #cbd5e1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.012);
}
.cmp-cat i { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--neon-primary); flex: 0 0 auto; }
.cmp-old { color: #94a3b8; }
.cmp-old.danger { color: #fb7185; font-weight: 700; }
.cmp-new {
    color: #ecfdf5; font-weight: 600;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(16,185,129,0.07), transparent 85%);
    border-left: 2px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.4);
}
.cmp-new.win { color: #6ee7b7; font-weight: 800; }
.cmp-badge {
    align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 3px;
    font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(16,185,129,0.14); color: #34d399; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
.cmp-grid > .cmp-cell:nth-last-child(-n+3) { border-bottom: none; }

@media (max-width: 760px) {
    .cmp-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .cmp-head { display: none; }
    .cmp-cat {
        background: rgba(0,243,255,0.06);
        font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
        color: #67e8f9; border-bottom: none; padding: 11px 16px;
    }
    .cmp-old, .cmp-new { padding: 11px 16px; }
    .cmp-old::before {
        content: "💀 PC Antiguo"; display: block;
        font-size: 0.58rem; color: #fb7185; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700;
    }
    .cmp-new::before {
        content: "🚀 Nuevo Setup 2.0"; display: block;
        font-size: 0.58rem; color: #34d399; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700;
    }
    .cmp-new { border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.18); }
    .cmp-grid > .cmp-cell:nth-last-child(-n+3) { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.045); }
}

</style>
</head>
<body class="p-4 md:p-8">

    <!-- Filtro SVG de refracción de cristal líquido (usado por .lq-refract) -->
    <svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute" aria-hidden="true">
        <filter id="liquidRefract">
            <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.012 0.016" numOctaves="2" seed="7" result="noise">
                <animate attributeName="baseFrequency" dur="22s" values="0.012 0.016;0.016 0.012;0.012 0.016" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            </feTurbulence>
            <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="18" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
        </filter>
    </svg>

    <!-- Grano de película sutil para textura cinematográfica -->
    <div class="film-grain" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Orbes Holográficos de Fondo -->
    <div class="bg-orb orb-cyan"></div>
    <div class="bg-orb orb-purple"></div>
    <div class="bg-orb orb-pink"></div>

    <!-- Cabecera persistente de navegación táctica -->
    <header class="cyber-header w-full mb-10 px-2">
        <div class="glass-panel py-4 px-6 md:px-10 flex items-center justify-between">
            
            <!-- Logo / Branding de Unai -->
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-400 to-purple-600 p-[2px] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,243,255,0.4)]">
                    <div class="w-full h-full rounded-[10px] bg-[#070b19] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                        <img id="headerLogoImg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Digi-Tech logo" class="w-full h-full object-contain p-0.5" style="filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(0,243,255,0.35));">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-lg font-extrabold tracking-wider bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-200 to-cyan-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">UNAI.DEV</h1>
                    <p class="text-[10px] tracking-widest text-cyan-400 uppercase font-bold console-font">PORTAFOLIO HUD UNIFICADO</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Panel de Personalización HUD (Sonido y Matrices de Color) -->
            <div class="hidden lg:flex items-center gap-4">
                <!-- Conmutador de Audio SFX -->
                <button onclick="toggleAudio()" id="audioToggleBtn" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-cyan-500/20 bg-cyan-500/5 hover:bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-400 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 transition-all">
                    <i data-lucide="volume-2" id="audioIcon" class="w-4 h-4 text-cyan-400"></i>
                    <span id="audioStatusText">AUDIO: SINTETIZADO</span>
                </button>

                <!-- Selector de Matriz de Color HUD -->
                <div class="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 p-1 rounded-lg">
                    <button onclick="changeMatrixTheme('default')" class="w-5 h-5 rounded bg-cyan-500 border border-transparent hover:scale-110 transition-transform" title="Fuerza Cyan"></button>
                    <button onclick="changeMatrixTheme('matrix')" class="w-5 h-5 rounded bg-emerald-500 border border-transparent hover:scale-110 transition-transform" title="Matriz Esmeralda"></button>
                    <button onclick="changeMatrixTheme('void')" class="w-5 h-5 rounded bg-purple-600 border border-transparent hover:scale-110 transition-transform" title="Vacío de Neón"></button>
                    <button onclick="changeMatrixTheme('solar')" class="w-5 h-5 rounded bg-orange-500 border border-transparent hover:scale-110 transition-transform" title="Llamarada Solar"></button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Menú Desplegable Opaco Militar -->
            <nav class="flex items-center gap-3 md:gap-5">

                <!-- Control de Acceso / Identidad -->
                <button id="authLoginBtn" onclick="openAuthModal(); playClick();" class="px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/8 hover:bg-emerald-500/16 text-emerald-300 hover:text-emerald-200 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)]">
                    <i data-lucide="fingerprint" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    <span class="hidden sm:inline">Acceder</span>
                </button>
                <div id="authProfilePill" class="profile-pill" style="display:none;" onclick="scrollToSection('auth-section'); playClick();" title="Ver mi panel de identidad">
                    <div id="ppAvatar" class="auth-avatar">U</div>
                    <span id="ppName" class="pp-name">Usuario</span>
                </div>

                <div class="projects-trigger-container" id="projectsTrigger">
                    <button onclick="playClick()" class="px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-cyan-500/20 bg-cyan-500/5 hover:bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 hover:text-cyan-200 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,243,255,0.15)]">
                        <span>🚀 Mis Proyectos</span>
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-300" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" id="dropdownArrow">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.5" d="M19 9l-7 7-7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>

                    <!-- CONTENIDO DE LA CONSOLA DE PROYECTOS -->
                    <div class="projects-dropdown">
                        <div class="scanner-line"></div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-800 pb-3 mb-4">
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-widest text-cyan-400 console-font flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-cyan-400 animate-pulse"></span>
                                STATUS_SISTEMA: ONLINE (5 ARTIFACTS DETECTADOS)
                            </span>
                            <span class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 console-font">Investigador: Unai</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Grid de Proyectos en el Dropdown -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                            <!-- Proyecto 1: INVENIO LABS -->
                            <div class="project-menu-card invenio-theme cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('invenio-section'); playClick();">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xs text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
                                    🛡️ Invenio Labs Chat
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-normal mb-2">Buscador y Chat con IA.</p>
                                <span class="text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300 font-semibold uppercase console-font">Inteligencia</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Proyecto 2: PC SETUP -->
                            <div class="project-menu-card pc-theme cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('setup-section'); playClick();">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xs text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
                                    🖥️ Setup PC 2.0
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-normal mb-2">Compatibilidad TPM 2.0.</p>
                                <span class="text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 font-semibold uppercase console-font">Hardware</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Proyecto 3: BASE DE DATOS BIOLÓGICA -->
                            <div class="project-menu-card cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('bio-section'); playClick();">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xs text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
                                    🔬 Base Biològica
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-normal mb-2">Placa Petri y Reinos.</p>
                                <span class="text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-300 font-semibold uppercase console-font">Ciencia</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Proyecto 4: BLOC DE NOTAS CON IA -->
                            <div class="project-menu-card notes-theme cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('notes-section'); playClick();">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xs text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
                                    📝 Copilot Notas IA
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-normal mb-2">Bloc de apuntes asistido.</p>
                                <span class="text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-pink-500/20 text-pink-300 font-semibold uppercase console-font">Utilidades</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Proyecto 5: CRIMINOLOGÍA FORENSE -->
                            <div class="project-menu-card forensic-menu-theme cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('forensic-section'); playClick();" style="grid-column: span 2;">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xs text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
                                    🔎 Criminología Forense
                                </h3>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-normal mb-2">Software, recursos y Analista IA.</p>
                                <span class="text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-rose-500/20 text-rose-300 font-semibold uppercase console-font">Ciencia Forense</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-slate-400 console-font">
                            <span>Desarrollador: Unai</span>
                            <span>IES Benalmádena · 2026</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Botón de consola local -->
                <a href="#console-box" onclick="playClick()" class="hidden md:inline-flex text-xs font-bold tracking-widest text-slate-400 hover:text-white uppercase console-font transition-all">
                    [ CONSOLE_LOG ]
                </a>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main class="mx-auto px-3 md:px-6" style="max-width: 1480px; width: 100%;">
        
        <!-- Sección de Bienvenida e Identificación de Investigador -->
        <section class="mb-10 text-center relative py-10">
            <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cyan-500/20 bg-cyan-500/5 mb-6 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,243,255,0.05)]">
                <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-cyan-400 animate-pulse" id="pulsatingNode"></span>
                <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyan-300 console-font">Expediente de Desarrollo de Unai</span>
            </div>
            
            <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-none mb-6">
                <span class="text-white">UNAI PROJECT</span><br>
                <span class="bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 via-sky-400 to-purple-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent drop-shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(0,243,255,0.25)]">CENTRAL HUBS v3.8</span>
            </h1>

            <p class="max-w-2xl mx-auto text-base md:text-lg text-slate-300 leading-relaxed mb-8">
                Como futuro detective, estudiante e investigador tecnológico en el <strong>IES Benalmádena</strong>, he construido este espacio de convergencia holográfico para mis proyectos de hardware, inteligencia computacional, ciencias biológicas y utilidades académicas optimizadas con IA.
            </p>

            <!-- Saludo personalizado según la identidad verificada -->
            <div id="heroGreeting" style="display:none;" class="max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-8 -mt-2">
                <div class="glass-panel liquid-glass px-5 py-4 flex items-center gap-4 text-left">
                    <div id="heroAvatar" class="auth-avatar" style="width:46px;height:46px;font-size:1.05rem;">U</div>
                    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <p id="heroGreetText" class="text-sm md:text-base font-bold text-white truncate">Bienvenido</p>
                        <p id="heroGreetSub" class="text-[11px] md:text-xs text-cyan-300 console-font tracking-wide truncate">Identidad verificada</p>
                    </div>
                    <button onclick="scrollToSection('auth-section'); playClick();" class="text-[11px] font-semibold text-emerald-300 hover:text-emerald-200 border border-emerald-500/30 hover:border-emerald-400/60 bg-emerald-500/8 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap">
                        <i data-lucide="layout-dashboard" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Mi panel
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Grid de Métricas de Inmersión -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 max-w-5xl mx-auto text-left">
                <div class="glass-panel p-4">
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase console-font">Estatus de Red</p>
                    <p class="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-1">
                        <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-ping"></span> ESTABLE
                    </p>
                </div>
                <div class="glass-panel p-4">
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase console-font">Proyectos Vinculados</p>
                    <p class="text-xl font-bold text-cyan-400 mt-1">5 Sistemas</p>
                </div>
                <div class="glass-panel p-4">
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase console-font">Frecuencia HUD</p>
                    <p class="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400 mt-1">240Hz Stereo</p>
                </div>
                <div class="glass-panel p-4">
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase console-font">Colisiones Bio</p>
                    <p class="text-xl font-bold text-pink-400 mt-1" id="dynamicCollisionStat">0 Impactos</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ============================================================ -->
        <!-- ACCESO SEGURO · TERMINAL DE IDENTIDAD BIOMÉTRICA            -->
        <!-- ============================================================ -->
        <section id="auth-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
                <div class="w-11 h-11 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#06b6d4);box-shadow:0 0 22px -4px #10b981;">
                    <i data-lucide="shield-check" class="w-5 h-5 text-[#050a16]"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold text-white tracking-tight">Acceso Seguro</h2>
                    <p class="text-[11px] md:text-xs text-emerald-300 console-font tracking-widest uppercase">Terminal de Identidad · Biometría v1.0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="hidden md:flex ml-auto gap-2">
                    <span class="liquid-chip text-[10px]">🔐 Cifrado E2E</span>
                    <span class="liquid-chip text-[10px]">🧬 Biométrico</span>
                    <span class="liquid-chip text-[10px]">⚡ Personalizado</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ESTADO: SIN SESIÓN (Invitación) -->
            <div id="authCta" class="glass-panel liquid-glass identity-cta">
                <div class="id-badge"><i data-lucide="fingerprint"></i></div>
                <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2 relative">Identifícate para desbloquear tu panel</h3>
                <p class="max-w-md mx-auto text-sm text-slate-400 mb-7 relative leading-relaxed">
                    Inicia sesión con <strong class="text-white">Google</strong> o con tu <strong class="text-white">correo electrónico</strong>. El sistema reconocerá tu proveedor, generará tu perfil y personalizará la bienvenida <span class="text-cyan-300">según tu cuenta</span>.
                </p>
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 justify-center max-w-md mx-auto relative">
                    <button onclick="openAuthModal('google'); playClick();" class="google-btn">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#EA4335" d="M24 9.5c3.54 0 6.71 1.22 9.21 3.6l6.85-6.85C35.9 2.38 30.47 0 24 0 14.62 0 6.51 5.38 2.56 13.22l7.98 6.19C12.43 13.72 17.74 9.5 24 9.5z"/><path fill="#4285F4" d="M46.98 24.55c0-1.57-.15-3.09-.38-4.55H24v9.02h12.94c-.58 2.96-2.26 5.48-4.78 7.18l7.73 6c4.51-4.18 7.09-10.36 7.09-17.65z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M10.53 28.59c-.48-1.45-.76-2.99-.76-4.59s.27-3.14.76-4.59l-7.98-6.19C.92 16.46 0 20.12 0 24c0 3.88.92 7.54 2.56 10.78l7.97-6.19z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M24 48c6.48 0 11.93-2.13 15.89-5.81l-7.73-6c-2.15 1.45-4.92 2.3-8.16 2.3-6.26 0-11.57-4.22-13.47-9.91l-7.98 6.19C6.51 42.62 14.62 48 24 48z"/></svg>
                        Continuar con Google
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="openAuthModal('email'); playClick();" class="auth-submit" style="background:linear-gradient(120deg,var(--neon-primary),var(--neon-tertiary));">
                        <i data-lucide="mail"></i> Entrar con correo
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-x-6 gap-y-2 mt-7 text-[11px] text-slate-500 console-font relative">
                    <span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><i data-lucide="lock" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-400"></i> Sesión local cifrada</span>
                    <span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><i data-lucide="scan-face" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i> Verificación biométrica</span>
                    <span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-purple-400"></i> Perfil adaptativo</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ESTADO: SESIÓN ACTIVA (Panel de Identidad) -->
            <div id="authDash" class="identity-dash">
                <div class="glass-panel liquid-glass p-6 md:p-7">
                    <!-- Cabecera del perfil -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center gap-5 mb-6">
                        <div id="dashAvatar" class="auth-avatar" style="width:76px;height:76px;font-size:1.9rem;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.12),0 0 35px -6px var(--neon-primary);">U</div>
                        <div class="text-center sm:text-left flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <p id="dashWelcome" class="text-[11px] text-emerald-300 console-font tracking-widest uppercase mb-1">Sesión verificada</p>
                            <h3 id="dashName" class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-white truncate">Usuario</h3>
                            <p id="dashEmail" class="text-sm text-slate-400 truncate console-font">usuario@correo.com</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="logout(); playClick();" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl border border-rose-500/30 bg-rose-500/8 hover:bg-rose-500/16 text-rose-300 hover:text-rose-200 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 transition-all whitespace-nowrap">
                            <i data-lucide="log-out" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Cerrar sesión
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Mensaje personalizado según el dominio -->
                    <div id="dashProviderMsg" class="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-2xl mb-6" style="background:rgba(2,6,18,0.5);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);">
                        <span id="dashProviderEmoji" class="text-2xl">🛡️</span>
                        <p id="dashProviderText" class="text-sm text-slate-300 flex-1">Cuenta verificada correctamente.</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cuadrícula de datos derivados del correo -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6">
                        <div class="id-stat"><p class="lbl">Proveedor</p><p id="statProvider" class="val">—</p></div>
                        <div class="id-stat"><p class="lbl">Perfil detectado</p><p id="statRole" class="val">—</p></div>
                        <div class="id-stat"><p class="lbl">Último acceso</p><p id="statLast" class="val">—</p></div>
                        <div class="id-stat"><p class="lbl">ID de sesión</p><p id="statSession" class="val console-font" style="font-size:0.8rem;">—</p></div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Nivel de acreditación -->
                    <div class="id-stat">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <p class="lbl">Nivel de acreditación</p>
                            <p id="clearanceLabel" class="text-xs font-bold text-cyan-300 console-font">—</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="clearance-bar"><div id="clearanceBar"></div></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PROYECTO 1: INVENIO LABS V2.5 (AHORA CON CHAT CONVERSACIONAL DE IA) -->
        <section id="invenio-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-blue-600/5 rounded-3xl filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

            <div class="glass-panel p-6 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="scanner-line" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #3b82f6, transparent); animation-duration: 4s;"></div>
                
                <!-- Encabezado de Sección Invenio -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-6 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="p-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500/20 to-indigo-600/20 rounded-xl border border-blue-500/30">
                            <i data-lucide="shield-alert" class="w-8 h-8 text-blue-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-blue-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">INVENIO LABS CHAT v2.8</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font font-semibold">Consola Conversacional Cognitiva & Búsqueda con Grounding</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/25 text-blue-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-400 animate-pulse"></span> Gemini 3.0 Flash</span>
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/25 text-indigo-300 text-xs font-semibold console-font">NotebookLM Activo</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Interfaz Invenio a 2 columnas -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 relative z-10">
                    
                    <!-- Panel Izquierdo: Configuración e Historial -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6">
                        <!-- Consola de Configuración -->
                        <div class="bg-[#030611]/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.05)]">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-400 font-bold text-sm tracking-wide console-font">
                                <i data-lucide="sliders" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                PARÁMETROS COGNITIVOS
                            </div>

                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 mb-1.5 uppercase console-font">Motor propulsado por IA</label>
                                <select id="gemini-model" onchange="playClick()" class="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 text-slate-300 transition-colors">
                                    <option value="claude-sonnet" selected>🧠 Claude Sonnet (Núcleo cognitivo)</option>
                                    <option value="claude-tactic">🛰️ Claude · Modo Táctico</option>
                                    <option value="claude-science">🔬 Claude · Modo Científico</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 mb-1.5 uppercase console-font">Modo de Análisis</label>
                                <select id="research-depth" onchange="playClick()" class="w-full bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 text-slate-300 transition-colors">
                                    <option value="forensic" selected>🔍 Forense / Analítico (profundo)</option>
                                    <option value="estandar">📊 Estándar (equilibrado)</option>
                                    <option value="rapido">⚡ Rápido (corto y directo)</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Fuentes & NotebookLM de Unai -->
                        <div class="bg-[#030611]/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.05)]">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-cyan-400 font-bold text-sm tracking-wide console-font">
                                <i data-lucide="book-open" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                NOTEBOOK-LM CONTEXT
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Enlace NotebookLM -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">Vincular Recurso Web</label>
                                <div class="flex gap-2">
                                    <input 
                                        type="url" 
                                        id="notebook-url" 
                                        placeholder="https://notebooklm.google.com/..." 
                                        class="flex-grow bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-650 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 transition-colors"
                                    >
                                    <button type="button" onclick="addNotebookLink(); playClick();" class="px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all shrink-0">
                                        +
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Carga de Archivos locales (Contexto de Notebook) -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">Cargar Notas Locales (.txt, .md)</label>
                                <div class="border border-dashed border-slate-800 hover:border-blue-500/40 rounded-xl p-3 text-center cursor-pointer transition-colors relative" id="dropzone">
                                    <input 
                                        type="file" 
                                        id="file-ingest" 
                                        accept=".txt,.md,.json,.html" 
                                        multiple 
                                        class="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 cursor-pointer" 
                                        onchange="handleIngestedFiles(event)"
                                    >
                                    <i data-lucide="file-up" class="w-5 h-5 mx-auto mb-1 text-slate-500"></i>
                                    <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 block">Suelte o elija archivos</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Lista de fuentes activas (Notebook Context) -->
                            <div class="border-t border-slate-800 pt-2">
                                <span class="text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font block mb-1.5">Fuentes del Cuaderno</span>
                                <div id="notebook-sources-list" class="flex flex-col gap-1.5 max-h-[120px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
                                    <div class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 italic text-center">Sin fuentes cargadas.</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Historial de Conversación / Sesiones de Chat -->
                        <div class="bg-[#030611]/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-5 rounded-2xl flex-grow flex flex-col min-h-[200px]">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 pb-2 border-b border-slate-800">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-indigo-400 font-bold text-sm tracking-wide console-font">
                                    <i data-lucide="history" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                    SESIONES GUARDADAS
                                </div>
                                <button onclick="clearInvenioHistory(); playClick();" class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 hover:text-red-400 transition-colors uppercase font-bold console-font">Borrar</button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div id="history-container" class="flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto max-h-[220px] pr-1 flex-grow scroll-smooth">
                                <!-- Generado dinámicamente -->
                                <div class="text-center text-slate-500 my-auto text-xs flex flex-col items-center">
                                    <i data-lucide="folder-search" class="w-6 h-6 mb-2 opacity-30"></i>
                                    Historial en blanco.
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Panel Derecho: Consola Conversacional Chat -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
                        
                        <!-- Contenedor del Chat Conversacional -->
                        <div class="bg-[#0a0f1c] border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl flex-grow flex flex-col overflow-hidden min-h-[500px] shadow-2xl">
                            <!-- Barra superior del Chat -->
                            <div class="bg-[#0d1324] px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-800 flex flex-wrap justify-between items-center gap-4">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <i data-lucide="message-square" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i>
                                    <span class="font-bold text-xs tracking-widest text-slate-300 console-font uppercase">CONSOLA COGNITIVA ACTIVA</span>
                                    <span id="invenio-ai-status" class="ai-status-pill ai-offline"><span class="dot"></span>IA: CLAUDE</span>
                                </div>
                                
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <!-- Switch de Grounding (Búsqueda web en tiempo real) -->
                                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-800" title="Permite a Claude buscar en la web en tiempo real">
                                        <span class="text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider console-font">Búsqueda Internacional</span>
                                        <button id="groundingToggleBtn" onclick="toggleGrounding(); playClick();" class="w-8 h-4 bg-slate-800 rounded-full relative p-0.5 border border-slate-700 transition-colors duration-200">
                                            <span id="groundingToggleBall" class="block w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-slate-500 rounded-full transition-transform duration-200 transform translate-x-0"></span>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    <button onclick="clearCurrentChat(); playClick();" class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 hover:text-red-400 uppercase font-bold console-font flex items-center gap-1">
                                        <i data-lucide="trash-2" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Limpiar
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Contenedor de Mensajes -->
                            <div class="p-5 overflow-y-auto max-h-[420px] min-h-[380px] flex-grow flex flex-col gap-4 relative" id="chat-messages-container">
                                
                                <!-- Mensaje de Bienvenida de la IA -->
                                <div class="chat-bubble chat-bubble-ai prose">
                                    <p>🛡️ <strong>[NÚCLEO COGNITIVO CLAUDE · EN LÍNEA]</strong></p>
                                    <p>Bienvenido, Investigador Unai. Soy <strong>Invenio Labs</strong>, tu terminal de inteligencia. Pregúntame sobre biología, hardware, ciberseguridad o cualquier tema técnico. Activa el switch <strong>Búsqueda web</strong> de arriba para que consulte la red en tiempo real, o pulsa una sugerencia rápida abajo. ⚡</p>
                                </div>

                            </div>

                            <!-- Loader del Chat (Efecto pensando) -->
                            <div id="chat-thinking-indicator" class="hidden px-5 py-3 border-t border-slate-900/60 bg-black/40 items-center gap-3 text-xs text-blue-400 font-mono">
                                <i data-lucide="loader-2" class="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-blue-400"></i>
                                <span id="chat-thinking-text">Sintetizando enlaces de red y analizando datos...</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Entrada de Mensaje del Chat -->
                            <div class="p-4 bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-800">
                                <!-- Sugerencias rápidas -->
                                <div class="flex gap-2 mb-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1" id="quick-prompts">
                                    <button type="button" class="quick-chip" onclick="quickPrompt(this)">🧬 Explica la mitosis</button>
                                    <button type="button" class="quick-chip" onclick="quickPrompt(this)">🖥️ ¿Qué es un cuello de botella?</button>
                                    <button type="button" class="quick-chip" onclick="quickPrompt(this)">🛡️ ¿Cómo funciona un SIEM?</button>
                                    <button type="button" class="quick-chip" onclick="quickPrompt(this)">🔬 Diferencia procariota/eucariota</button>
                                </div>
                                <form id="chat-input-form" onsubmit="sendChatMessage(event)" class="flex gap-3 items-end">
                                    <textarea 
                                        id="chat-message-input" 
                                        rows="1"
                                        autocomplete="off"
                                        placeholder="Ingresa tu consulta táctica o científica…  (Enter envía · Shift+Enter salto de línea)" 
                                        class="flex-grow bg-[#050915] border border-slate-700/80 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all text-sm font-medium resize-none max-h-32"
                                        oninput="autoGrowTextarea(this)"
                                        onkeydown="chatInputKeydown(event)"
                                        required
                                    ></textarea>
                                    <button 
                                        type="submit" 
                                        id="chat-send-btn"
                                        class="lq-btn bg-blue-600/80 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-blue-400/50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none"
                                    >
                                        <span>Enviar</span>
                                        <i data-lucide="send" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Notification Toast Invenio -->
                <div id="invenio-toast" class="absolute bottom-6 right-6 bg-slate-900/90 border border-blue-500/50 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl shadow-lg flex items-center gap-3 transform translate-y-20 opacity-0 pointer-events-none transition-all duration-300 z-50 backdrop-blur-md">
                    <i data-lucide="check-circle-2" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i>
                    <span id="invenio-toast-text" class="text-xs font-semibold text-white console-font tracking-wide">Acción completada con éxito</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PROYECTO 2: SETUP PC 2.0 (Medion & Windows 11 Compatibility) -->
        <section id="setup-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-purple-600/5 rounded-3xl filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>
            
            <div class="glass-panel p-6 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="scanner-line" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--neon-secondary), transparent); animation-duration: 5s;"></div>

                <!-- Cabecera Setup -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-6 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="p-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500/20 to-pink-600/20 rounded-xl border border-purple-500/30">
                            <i data-lucide="monitor" class="w-8 h-8 text-purple-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-purple-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">SETUP PC 2.1</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font font-semibold">Expediente de Actualización Oficial hacia Windows 11</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/25 text-purple-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-purple-400 animate-ping"></span> Telemetría Activa</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Contenido Informativo y Telemetría Interactiva -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <!-- Detalle del Proyecto de Investigación -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col justify-between">
                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5">
                                <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-purple-400 animate-pulse"></span>
                                <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-purple-300 console-font uppercase">Medion H81H3-EM2 Renovado</span>
                            </div>
                            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-white">Análisis de cuellos de botella e investigación de mercado</h3>
                            <p class="text-slate-300 leading-relaxed text-sm">
                                Como estudiante e investigador tecnológico, diseñé este plan de actualización para superar el estricto bloqueo de compatibilidad de Microsoft. Al sustituir piezas clave de arquitectura heredada por componentes modernos, se ha erradicado el cuello de botella severo que sufría la tarjeta gráfica y el sistema ha obtenido compatibilidad absoluta con TPM 2.0.
                            </p>
                            
                            <!-- INTERACTIVE SVG PC SCHEMATIC BLUEPRINT -->
                            <div class="p-4 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl">
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-2 console-font flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <i data-lucide="layout" class="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400"></i>
                                    Análisis Estructural del Chasis (Antec AX20)
                                </h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mb-3">Pulsa sobre los componentes del esquema para realizar una prueba de lectura dinámica:</p>
                                
                                <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center">
                                    <svg class="w-32 h-32 text-slate-500" viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                        <!-- Estructura del Chasis -->
                                        <rect x="15" y="10" width="70" height="80" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" />
                                        <!-- CPU Cooler -->
                                        <circle id="svg-cpu" onclick="selectSvgHardware('cpu')" class="chassis-part fill-purple-500/10 stroke-purple-500 animate-pulse animate-duration-1000" cx="45" cy="35" r="12" stroke-dasharray="2 1" />
                                        <!-- GPU Card -->
                                        <rect id="svg-gpu" onclick="selectSvgHardware('gpu')" class="chassis-part fill-blue-500/10 stroke-blue-500" x="25" y="52" width="50" height="15" rx="2" />
                                        <!-- RAM modules -->
                                        <rect id="svg-ram" onclick="selectSvgHardware('ram')" class="chassis-part fill-emerald-500/10 stroke-emerald-500" x="62" y="24" width="6" height="22" rx="1" />
                                        <!-- Fuente de Alimentación -->
                                        <rect id="svg-psu" onclick="selectSvgHardware('psu')" class="chassis-part fill-red-500/10 stroke-red-500" x="20" y="74" width="40" height="12" rx="2" />
                                        <!-- Texto indicador -->
                                        <text x="35" y="81" font-size="5" fill="#555" font-family="monospace">PSU</text>
                                        <text x="43" y="61" font-size="5" fill="#555" font-family="monospace">GPU (GTX 1060)</text>
                                    </svg>
                                    
                                    <!-- Caja de diagnóstico rápido SVG -->
                                    <div class="flex-grow bg-slate-900/60 p-3 rounded-lg border border-slate-800 self-stretch flex flex-col justify-center">
                                        <span class="text-[10px] text-purple-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest console-font block mb-1">Diagnóstico en Caliente:</span>
                                        <div id="svgDiagnosticText" class="text-xs text-slate-300 font-mono leading-relaxed">&gt; Selecciona un nodo en el plano vectorial...</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Selector de simulación de Hardware -->
                        <div class="mt-6 p-4 bg-slate-900/60 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl">
                            <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-3 console-font">Interruptor de Simulación de Telemetría</h4>
                            <div class="flex gap-3">
                                <button id="btnSetupAntiguo" onclick="selectSetup('antiguo')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/5 text-red-400 text-xs font-bold transition-all">
                                    💀 Hardware Antiguo (Medion)
                                </button>
                                <button id="btnSetupNuevo" onclick="selectSetup('nuevo')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border border-purple-500 bg-purple-500/20 text-white text-xs font-bold transition-all">
                                    🚀 Setup PC 2.1 (Mejorado)
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Panel de Telemetría en Vivo -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5">
                        <div class="bg-black/80 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 p-6 console-font relative shadow-lg">
                            <div class="absolute right-4 top-4 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-purple-500 animate-pulse"></span>
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-purple-400 uppercase font-bold">LIVE_MONITOR</span>
                            </div>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest border-b border-slate-800 pb-2 mb-4">Telemetría de Hardware</h3>
                            
                            <div class="space-y-3 text-xs">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1 border-b border-slate-900">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">PROCESADOR (CPU):</span>
                                    <span id="teleCpu" class="text-white font-bold">Cargando...</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1 border-b border-slate-900">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">GRÁFICOS (GPU):</span>
                                    <span id="teleGpu" class="text-white">GTX 1060 6GB</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1 border-b border-slate-900">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">ANCHO BANDA RAM:</span>
                                    <span id="teleRam" class="text-white font-bold">Cargando...</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1 border-b border-slate-900">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">CUELLO DE BOTELLA:</span>
                                    <span id="teleBottleneck" class="font-extrabold text-red-400">Calculando...</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1 border-b border-slate-900">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">SOPORTE WINDOWS 11:</span>
                                    <span id="teleWindows11" class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wide font-extrabold text-red-400">ANALIZANDO</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-1">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">RENDIMIENTO JUEGOS:</span>
                                    <span id="teleFps" class="text-emerald-400 font-bold">-- FPS</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Tarjetas Detalladas de Componentes -->
                <div class="relative z-10 mb-8">
                    <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i data-lucide="cpu" class="w-5 h-5 text-purple-400"></i>
                        Expediente de Componentes Adquiridos
                    </h3>
                    
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
                        <!-- Procesador -->
                        <div class="bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[18px]">🧠</span>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-white mt-1">Intel i3-12100F</h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
                                    Pese a ser i3, posee arquitectura de 12ª Gen duplicando la potencia bruta de mi i5-4570 anterior.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400">94,00 €</span>
                                <a href="https://www.amazon.es/dp/B09QG131DT" target="_blank" class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded border border-purple-500/20 transition-all font-bold uppercase">Amazon</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Placa Base -->
                        <div class="bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[18px]">🔌</span>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-white mt-1">MSI H610M-E</h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
                                    Incorpora el módulo criptográfico TPM 2.0 que exige Windows 11 para su instalación limpia.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400">58,00 €</span>
                                <a href="https://www.amazon.es/MSI-Placa-Base-1700-H610M/dp/B0BKRDV1V3" target="_blank" class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded border border-purple-500/20 transition-all font-bold uppercase">Amazon</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Memoria RAM -->
                        <div class="bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[18px]">💾</span>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-white mt-1">Fury Beast 16GB</h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
                                    Dos módulos DDR4 de 8GB en Dual Channel a 3200MHz, eliminando el bus de canal único anterior.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400">68,00 €</span>
                                <a href="https://www.miravia.es" target="_blank" class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded border border-purple-500/20 transition-all font-bold uppercase">Miravia</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Chasis / Torre -->
                        <div class="bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[18px]">🌡️</span>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-white mt-1">Antec AX20</h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
                                    Frontal de tipo Mesh para maximizar la inducción de aire fresco, cristal templado y ventiladores RGB.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400">41,78 €</span>
                                <a href="https://www.pccomponentes.com/antec-ax20-midi-tower-cristal-templado-usb-30-frgb-negra" target="_blank" class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded border border-purple-500/20 transition-all font-bold uppercase">PCC</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Fuente de Alimentación -->
                        <div class="bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-4 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[18px]">⚡</span>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-white mt-1">MAG A550BN</h4>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">
                                    550W certificados 80 Plus Bronze. Protecciones de seguridad contra picos OVP y cortocircuitos.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-slate-900 flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400">50,40 €</span>
                                <a href="https://www.amazon.es/MSI-MAG-A550BN-alimentaci%C3%B3n-DC/dp/B0991W1HKT" target="_blank" class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 rounded border border-purple-500/20 transition-all font-bold uppercase">Amazon</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Tabla Forense: PC Antiguo vs Setup 2.0 (rediseñada) -->
                <div class="relative z-10 mb-8">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2.5 mb-4">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon-primary),var(--neon-secondary));box-shadow:0 0 18px -4px var(--neon-primary);">
                            <i data-lucide="git-compare-arrows" class="w-4 h-4 text-[#050a16]"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white leading-tight">Análisis Comparativo del Diagnóstico</h3>
                            <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 console-font uppercase tracking-widest">Antes vs Después · Migración de plataforma</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="cmp-wrap glass-panel liquid-glass">
                        <div class="cmp-grid">
                            <!-- Cabeceras -->
                            <div class="cmp-head cmp-head-cell cmp-head-cat"><i data-lucide="list" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Categoría</div>
                            <div class="cmp-head cmp-head-cell cmp-head-old">💀 Mi PC Antiguo (Medion)</div>
                            <div class="cmp-head cmp-head-cell cmp-head-new">🚀 Mi Nuevo Setup 2.0</div>

                            <!-- Procesador -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="cpu"></i> Procesador</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old">Intel Core i5-4570 @ 3.20 GHz<br><span class="text-slate-500 text-[0.72rem]">4 hilos · Haswell 2013</span></div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new">Intel Core i3-12100F<br><span class="text-emerald-400/70 text-[0.72rem]">8 hilos · Alder Lake 2022</span></div>

                            <!-- Rendimiento CPU -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="gauge"></i> Rendimiento CPU</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old danger">~4.800 pts<br><span class="font-normal text-slate-500 text-[0.72rem]">Cinebench R23 (Sin HT)</span></div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new win">~12.000 pts<span class="cmp-badge">▲ +150%</span></div>

                            <!-- Placa Base -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="circuit-board"></i> Placa Base</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old">H81H3-EM2<br><span class="text-slate-500 text-[0.72rem]">Sin TPM 2.0 ni puertos M.2</span></div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new">MSI PRO H610M-E<br><span class="text-emerald-400/70 text-[0.72rem]">TPM 2.0 + M.2 NVMe</span></div>

                            <!-- Soporte Windows 11 -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="shield-check"></i> Soporte Windows 11</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old danger">⛔ BLOQUEADO por Microsoft</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new win">✓ 100% COMPATIBLE Y HOMOLOGADO</div>

                            <!-- Memoria RAM -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="memory-stick"></i> Memoria RAM</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old">16 GB DDR3 Single Channel<br><span class="text-slate-500 text-[0.72rem]">~12.8 GB/s</span></div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new">16 GB DDR4 Dual 3200 MHz<br><span class="text-emerald-400/70 text-[0.72rem]">~51 GB/s</span><span class="cmp-badge">×4 ancho de banda</span></div>

                            <!-- Escalabilidad -->
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-cat"><i data-lucide="trending-up"></i> Escalabilidad</div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-old danger">Plataforma descatalogada<br><span class="font-normal text-slate-500 text-[0.72rem]">Socket LGA1150</span></div>
                            <div class="cmp-cell cmp-new">Plataforma LGA1700<br><span class="text-emerald-400/70 text-[0.72rem]">Ampliable hasta i9-12900K</span></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Componentes Rescatados (Gasto 0€) -->
                <div class="relative z-10 p-5 bg-purple-950/20 border border-purple-500/20 rounded-2xl">
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-sm text-purple-300 uppercase tracking-widest console-font flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                        <i data-lucide="shield-check" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                        Vectores de Ahorro: Componentes Rescatados (0€)
                    </h3>
                    <ul class="text-xs text-slate-300 space-y-2">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <span class="text-emerald-400 font-bold mt-0.5">✔</span>
                            <span><strong>Tarjeta Gráfica:</strong> NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 de 6GB. Reutilizada sin provocar estrangulamiento térmico ni cuello de botella en la nueva interfaz PCIe 4.0.</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <span class="text-emerald-400 font-bold mt-0.5">✔</span>
                            <span><strong>SSD Crucial 233GB:</strong> Reutilizado para albergar el sistema operativo Windows 11 y asegurar arranques instantáneos de la terminal.</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <span class="text-emerald-400 font-bold mt-0.5">✔</span>
                            <span><strong>HDD Western Digital 466GB:</strong> Preservado para el almacenamiento general de informes y copias de seguridad de Obsidian.</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PROYECTO 3: BASE DE DATOS BIOLÓGICA (Petri Dish & Taxonomy) -->
        <section id="bio-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-emerald-600/5 rounded-3xl filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

            <div class="glass-panel p-6 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="scanner-line" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--neon-success), transparent); animation-duration: 6s;"></div>

                <!-- Cabecera Biología -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-6 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="p-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-500/20 to-teal-600/20 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/30">
                            <i data-lucide="beaker" class="w-8 h-8 text-emerald-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-emerald-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">BASE DE DATOS BIOLÓGICA V3.2</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-emerald-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font font-semibold">Base Biológica de Seres Vivos e Interacción en Placa</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
