                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/25 text-emerald-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-ping"></span> Laboratorio Vivo</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Estructura de Bio a 2 columnas -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 relative z-10">
                    
                    <!-- Panel Izquierdo: Fichas de Estudio y Diccionario -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-6">
                        <!-- Tarjetas de Selección de Reinos -->
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-3 console-font">Expedientes de Reinos Celulares</h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                                <button onclick="showBioFeature('moneras'); playClick();" class="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-emerald-500/20 bg-emerald-500/5 hover:bg-emerald-500/15 text-xs font-bold text-emerald-300 transition-all text-center">
                                    🦠 Moneras
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="showBioFeature('protoctistas'); playClick();" class="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-blue-500/20 bg-blue-500/5 hover:bg-blue-500/15 text-xs font-bold text-blue-300 transition-all text-center">
                                    🧬 Protoctistas
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="showBioFeature('hongos'); playClick();" class="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-yellow-500/20 bg-yellow-500/5 hover:bg-yellow-500/15 text-xs font-bold text-yellow-300 transition-all text-center">
                                    🍄 Fungi
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="showBioFeature('virus'); playClick();" class="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/5 hover:bg-red-500/15 text-xs font-bold text-red-300 transition-all text-center">
                                    ⚠️ Virus
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Visor de Detalles Taxonómicos -->
                        <div class="p-5 bg-[#040813]/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl relative">
                            <h4 id="bioDetailTitle" class="text-sm font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider console-font mb-2">🦠 REINO MONERAS (BACTERIAS)</h4>
                            <p id="bioDetailDesc" class="text-slate-300 text-xs leading-relaxed">
                                Organismos procariotas sin núcleo celular. ADN libre en el nucleoide. Se dividen asexualmente por bipartición veloz. Sus formas son de cocos (esferas), bacilos (bastones), vibrios (comas) y espirilos (muelles)."
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Diccionario Técnico -->
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-3 console-font">Glosario Clínico</h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 max-h-[160px] overflow-y-auto pr-2">
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Autótrofo]</strong> Produce su propio alimento mediante fotosíntesis o quimiosíntesis.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Heterótrofo]</strong> Requiere asimilar compuestos orgánicos de otros seres vivos.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Bipartición]</strong> Tipo de fisión binaria donde una bacteria madre genera dos hijas.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Cápsida]</strong> Envoltura de proteínas que resguarda el genoma vírico (ADN/ARN).
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Saprófito]</strong> Organismo que digiere y descompone detritos de materia orgánica muerta.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2 bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-emerald-400 font-mono">[Seudópodo]</strong> Falsos pies de citoplasma que extienden las amebas para caza.
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Test de Campo (10 Preguntas) -->
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-2 console-font">Test de Campo (10 Qs - Pulsa para revelar)</h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 max-h-[220px] overflow-y-auto pr-2">
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">1. ¿Reproducción asexual bacteriana?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Por bipartición.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">2. ¿Tipos morfológicos bacterianos?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Cocos, bacilos, vibrios y espirilos.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">3. ¿Cómo se desplaza una ameba?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Emitiendo seudópodos (falsos pies).</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">4. ¿Alga profunda y pigmento?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Alga roja (Ficoeritrina).</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">5. ¿Pared celular fungi?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">De quitina.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">6. ¿Qué es el micelio?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Conjunto de hifas de un hongo.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">7. ¿Composición de un liquen?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Un hongo y un alga (simbiosis).</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">8. ¿Son los virus seres vivos?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">No, carecen de metabolismo y células.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">9. ¿Función de la cápsida?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Resguardar el ácido nucleico viral.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 bg-slate-950/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">10. ¿Moneras vs Protoctistas?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-mono mt-1">Moneras: Procariotas / Protoctistas: Eucariotas.</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Panel Derecho: Microscopio / Petri Dish interactivo -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col gap-4">
                        <div class="p-4 bg-[#050916] rounded-2xl border border-slate-800">
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font mb-3">Inyectores del Laboratorio</h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mb-4">
                                <button onclick="spawnMicrobe('bacilo')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/30 hover:bg-emerald-500/25 text-emerald-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                    🟢 Bacilos
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="spawnMicrobe('coco')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/30 hover:bg-cyan-500/25 text-cyan-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                    🔵 Cocos
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="spawnMicrobe('ameba')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-500/30 hover:bg-yellow-500/25 text-yellow-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                    🟡 Ameba
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="spawnMicrobe('paramecio')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30 hover:bg-purple-500/25 text-purple-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                    🟣 Paramecio
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex gap-2">
                                <button onclick="spawnMicrobe('virus')" class="lq-btn flex-grow px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-red-600/90 hover:bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-extrabold flex items-center justify-center gap-1 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)]">
                                    ⚠️ Inyectar Virus
                                </button>
                                <button id="petriPauseBtn" onclick="togglePetriPause()" class="lq-btn px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-amber-300 text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-1 whitespace-nowrap">
                                    <i data-lucide="pause" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Pausar
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="clearPetriDish(); playClick();" class="lq-btn px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-300 hover:text-white text-xs font-bold">
                                    Esterilizar
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 console-font mt-2 leading-relaxed">🧫 Las bacterias se nutren de los puntos verdes y se dividen por <b>bipartición</b>. Los <b>virus</b> infectan bacterias (ciclo lítico) y las <b>amebas</b> fagocitan presas menores.</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Visor de Microscopio con efecto de lente -->
                        <div class="w-full h-[320px] bg-black rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 relative overflow-hidden shadow-[inset_0_0_50px_rgba(0,243,255,0.15)]">
                            <div id="integratedPetriDish" class="w-full h-full absolute"></div>
                            
                            <!-- Retícula e iluminación del ocular -->
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none" style="background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 100%), linear-gradient(rgba(0,243,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,243,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 100%, 40px 40px, 40px 40px;"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PROYECTO 4: NUEVO COOPERATIVO CO-PILOT IA Y NOTAS (System 4) -->
        <section id="notes-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-pink-600/5 rounded-3xl filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

            <div class="glass-panel p-6 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="scanner-line" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--neon-tertiary), transparent); animation-duration: 4.5s;"></div>

                <!-- Cabecera Notas IA -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-6 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="p-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-pink-500/20 to-purple-600/20 rounded-xl border border-pink-500/30">
                            <i data-lucide="pencil-ruler" class="w-8 h-8 text-pink-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-pink-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">BLOC DE NOTAS CON COPILOT AI</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-pink-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font font-semibold">Toma de notas tácticas, resúmenes automáticos y cuestionarios de estudio</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-pink-500/10 border border-pink-500/25 text-pink-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-pink-400 animate-pulse"></span> Copilot Activo</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Interfaz del Bloc de Notas IA -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 relative z-10">
                    
                    <!-- Columna Izquierda: Listado de Notas Guardadas -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-3 flex flex-col gap-4">
                        <button onclick="createNewNote(); playClick();" class="w-full py-3 px-4 bg-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-500 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,127,0.3)]">
                            <i data-lucide="plus" class="w-4 h-4"></i> NUEVA NOTA
                        </button>
                        
                        <div class="bg-black/60 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-4 flex-grow flex flex-col min-h-[250px] max-h-[400px]">
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider console-font block mb-3">HISTORIAL DE APUNTES</span>
                            
                            <div id="notes-sidebar-list" class="flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto flex-grow pr-1">
                                <!-- Cargado dinámicamente -->
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Columna Derecha: Editor y Panel IA -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-9 flex flex-col gap-6">
                        
                        <!-- Formulario del Editor de Notas -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <!-- Input Título y Categoría -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">Título del Apunte</label>
                                <input 
                                    type="text" 
                                    id="note-title-input" 
                                    placeholder="Ej: Apuntes de Mitosis Celular..." 
                                    oninput="saveCurrentNoteState()"
                                    class="w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-pink-500 transition-colors"
                                >
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                                <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">Categoría / Tag</label>
                                <select id="note-category-select" onchange="saveCurrentNoteState(); playClick();" class="w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-pink-500 transition-colors">
                                    <option value="Biología">🔬 Ciencias Biológicas</option>
                                    <option value="Hardware">🖥️ Hardware & Sistemas</option>
                                    <option value="Inteligencia">🧠 Inteligencia Artificial</option>
                                    <option value="General">📝 General / Notas Rápidas</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Panel de Redacción de Texto y Consola IA -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            
                            <!-- Área de Escritura Manual (Markdown Soportado) -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                    <label class="block text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">BORRADOR DE CONTENIDO (MARKDOWN)</label>
                                    <button onclick="clearCurrentNoteContent(); playClick();" class="text-[10px] text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 uppercase console-font transition-colors">Limpiar</button>
                                </div>
                                <textarea 
                                    id="note-body-textarea" 
                                    placeholder="Escribe tus notas de clase o pega un texto para analizar..." 
                                    oninput="saveCurrentNoteState()"
                                    class="w-full h-[280px] bg-slate-950/90 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-4 text-xs text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-pink-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-pink-500/30 transition-all font-sans leading-relaxed resize-none"
                                ></textarea>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Panel del Copiloto Inteligente de IA -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-3 bg-[#030611]/80 border border-slate-800/80 p-5 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden">
                                <div class="absolute right-0 top-0 w-24 h-24 bg-pink-500/5 blur-2xl rounded-full"></div>
                                
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-pink-400 font-extrabold tracking-widest console-font uppercase flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap">
                                    <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> IA DE COPILOT VINCULADA
                                    <span id="notes-ai-status" class="ai-status-pill ai-offline ml-1"><span class="dot"></span>COPILOT</span>
                                </span>
                                <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">
                                    Selecciona una de las siguientes directivas para que el modelo procese el contenido de tus notas de borrador:
                                </p>
                                
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2.5 mt-2 flex-grow">
                                    <button onclick="executeNoteCopilot('resumen')" class="p-3 rounded-xl bg-pink-500/10 border border-pink-500/20 hover:bg-pink-500/20 text-left transition-all">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-pink-300">📄 Crear Resumen</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Sintetiza en viñetas clave.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeNoteCopilot('estructurar')" class="p-3 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/20 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-left transition-all">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-purple-300">💎 Estilo Obsidian</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Optimiza títulos y esquemas.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeNoteCopilot('glosario')" class="p-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 hover:bg-blue-500/20 text-left transition-all">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-blue-300">📖 Extraer Glosario</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Define los términos técnicos.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeNoteCopilot('test')" class="p-3 rounded-xl bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20 hover:bg-emerald-500/20 text-left transition-all">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-emerald-300">❓ Generar Test</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Crea 3 preguntas de repaso.</p>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Resultado del Copiloto Renderizado -->
                        <div class="border border-slate-800 rounded-xl bg-[#030611] overflow-hidden flex flex-col min-h-[220px]">
                            <div class="bg-slate-900/60 px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between">
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold console-font tracking-wider">RESPUESTA OPTIMIZADA POR COPILOT</span>
                                
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <button id="btn-insert-note" onclick="applyAiResultToNote(); playClick();" disabled class="px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-pink-500/10 hover:bg-pink-500/20 text-pink-300 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded border border-pink-500/30 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-all">
                                        Insertar en borrador
                                    </button>
                                    <button id="btn-copy-ai-result" onclick="copyAiNoteResult(); playClick();" disabled class="p-1.5 hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded border border-transparent disabled:opacity-30 transition-all">
                                        <i data-lucide="copy" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="p-5 overflow-y-auto max-h-[300px] flex-grow text-left">
                                <!-- Loader de Nota -->
                                <div id="note-ai-loader" class="hidden flex-col items-center justify-center py-10">
                                    <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-6 h-6 text-pink-400 animate-spin mb-2"></i>
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">Copilot está procesando el texto...</span>
                                </div>
                                <!-- Estado Idle -->
                                <div id="note-ai-idle" class="text-slate-500 text-xs italic text-center py-10">
                                    Presiona alguna acción de Copilot AI superior para obtener análisis automatizados de tus apuntes.
                                </div>
                                <!-- Contenido final -->
                                <div id="note-ai-output" class="prose max-w-none hidden"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PROYECTO 5: CRIMINOLOGÍA FORENSE DIGITAL -->
        <section id="forensic-section" class="mb-14 scroll-mt-28 relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-rose-600/5 rounded-3xl filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

            <div class="glass-panel p-6 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="scanner-line" style="background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--forensic-primary), transparent); animation-duration: 4.2s;"></div>

                <!-- Cabecera Forense -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-6 mb-8 relative z-10">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="p-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-500/20 to-cyan-500/20 rounded-xl border border-rose-500/30">
                            <i data-lucide="fingerprint" class="w-8 h-8 text-rose-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-rose-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">CRIMINOLOGÍA FORENSE DIGITAL</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-rose-400 uppercase tracking-widest console-font font-semibold">Software Policial · Recursos Policiales · Analista de Casos con IA</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full liquid-chip text-rose-300 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-rose-400 animate-ping"></span> Laboratorio Policial</span>
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full liquid-chip text-cyan-300 text-xs font-semibold console-font">Cadena de Custodia OK</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- FILA SUPERIOR: Escáner Dactilar + Admisión de Evidencia -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 relative z-10 mb-10">

                    <!-- Escáner Biométrico Dactilar -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5">
                        <div class="liquid-glass p-6 h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-cyan-300 font-extrabold tracking-widest console-font uppercase mb-4 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                <i data-lucide="scan-line" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Escáner Biométrico Dactiloscópico Avanzado
                            </span>

                            <!-- SVG Huella Dactilar con escaneo -->
                            <div class="relative">
                                <svg width="150" height="170" viewBox="0 0 120 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="overflow-visible">
                                    <defs>
                                        <linearGradient id="fpScanGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                                            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="var(--forensic-accent)" stop-opacity="0"/>
                                            <stop offset="50%" stop-color="var(--forensic-accent)" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
                                            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="var(--forensic-accent)" stop-opacity="0"/>
                                        </linearGradient>
                                    </defs>
                                    <!-- Bisel del escáner -->
                                    <rect x="6" y="4" width="108" height="142" rx="18" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,224,255,0.18)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
                                    <!-- Crestas papilares (elipses anidadas) -->
                                    <g>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:0s"   cx="60" cy="72" rx="6"  ry="9"/>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:.15s" cx="60" cy="70" rx="13" ry="18"/>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:.30s" cx="59" cy="69" rx="20" ry="28"/>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:.45s" cx="60" cy="68" rx="27" ry="38"/>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:.60s" cx="59" cy="68" rx="34" ry="47"/>
                                        <ellipse class="fp-ridge fp-glow-pulse" style="animation-delay:.75s" cx="60" cy="68" rx="41" ry="55"/>
                                        <!-- Líneas delta -->
                                        <path class="fp-ridge" d="M 24 96 q 14 -10 30 -4" />
                                        <path class="fp-ridge" d="M 96 96 q -14 -10 -30 -4" />
                                    </g>
                                    <!-- Línea de escaneo -->
                                    <rect class="fp-scanline" x="10" y="6" width="100" height="10" rx="5"/>
                                </svg>
                                <span class="absolute -bottom-1 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 text-[9px] text-cyan-400 font-mono whitespace-nowrap">ID #UNAI-FRX-001</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Lectura de coincidencia -->
                            <div class="w-full mt-6 space-y-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px] console-font">
                                    <span class="text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Coincidencia Biométrica</span>
                                    <span id="fpMatchVal" class="text-cyan-400 font-bold">100%</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="w-full h-2 bg-slate-900 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-slate-800">
                                    <div id="fpMatchBar" class="match-bar-fill" style="width: 0%;"></div>
                                </div>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-emerald-400 console-font flex items-center gap-1.5 pt-1">
                                    <i data-lucide="badge-check" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Sujeto verificado · Acceso al laboratorio concedido
                                </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Panel de Telemetría de Investigación -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-4">
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                            <div class="liquid-glass p-4">
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Herramientas</p>
                                <p class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-rose-400 mt-1">10</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="liquid-glass p-4">
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Recursos Web</p>
                                <p class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-cyan-400 mt-1">13</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="liquid-glass p-4">
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Evidencias</p>
                                <p class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-amber-400 mt-1" id="evidenceCounter">0</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="liquid-glass p-4">
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Integridad</p>
                                <p class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-emerald-400 mt-1">SHA-256</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Disciplinas de la Ciencia Forense -->
                        <div class="liquid-glass p-5 flex-grow">
                            <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-rose-300 uppercase tracking-widest console-font flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                                <i data-lucide="microscope" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Ramas de la Investigación Criminal
                            </h4>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5 text-[11px] text-slate-300">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Forense Digital & Móvil</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Dactiloscopia & Lofoscopia</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Balística & Trazas</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Genética / ADN Forense</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Documentoscopia</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Entomología Forense</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> Toxicología (INTCF)</div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2"><span class="text-rose-400">▸</span> OSINT & Ciberinteligencia</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-800/80">
                                <button onclick="logEvidence(); playClick();" class="forensic-directive w-full py-2.5 bg-rose-500/10 border border-rose-500/30 text-rose-300 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                    <i data-lucide="package-plus" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Registrar Evidencia en Cadena de Custodia
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- CATÁLOGO DE SOFTWARE FORENSE -->
                <div class="relative z-10 mb-10">
                    <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-1 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i data-lucide="terminal-square" class="w-5 h-5 text-rose-400"></i>
                        Arsenal de Software Policial
                    </h3>
                    <p class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mb-5">Pulsa cualquier herramienta para desplegar su ficha técnica, caso de uso y enlace al sitio oficial verificado.</p>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6">
                        <!-- Rejilla de herramientas -->
                        <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3" id="forensicToolGrid">
                                <!-- Generado dinámicamente -->
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Ficha técnica de la herramienta -->
                        <div class="lg:col-span-5">
                            <div class="liquid-glass p-6 h-full flex flex-col" id="forensicDetailPanel">
                                <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] text-rose-300 font-extrabold tracking-widest console-font uppercase flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                        <i data-lucide="file-search" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Ficha Policial
                                    </span>
                                    <span id="fdCategory" class="text-[9px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full liquid-chip text-cyan-300 console-font uppercase">Disco</span>
                                </div>

                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                                    <span id="fdEmoji" class="text-3xl">🧬</span>
                                    <h4 id="fdName" class="text-xl font-extrabold text-white">Autopsy</h4>
                                </div>

                                <p id="fdDesc" class="text-xs text-slate-300 leading-relaxed mb-4 flex-grow">
                                    Plataforma forense digital de código abierto construida sobre The Sleuth Kit. Recupera archivos borrados, analiza líneas de tiempo, historiales web y artefactos del sistema.
                                </p>

                                <div class="mb-4">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] text-amber-400 font-bold uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Caso de uso típico</span>
                                    <p id="fdUseCase" class="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-relaxed">Análisis post-incidente de un disco duro incautado para reconstruir la actividad del sospechoso.</p>
                                </div>

                                <div class="mb-4">
                                    <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px] console-font mb-1.5">
                                        <span class="text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Adopción en Laboratorios</span>
                                        <span id="fdAdoptionVal" class="text-cyan-400 font-bold">92%</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-900 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-slate-800">
                                        <div id="fdAdoptionBar" class="match-bar-fill" style="width: 92%;"></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <a id="fdLink" href="https://www.autopsy.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="forensic-directive w-full py-2.5 bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/30 text-cyan-300 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl">
                                    <i data-lucide="external-link" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Visitar Sitio Oficial
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- ANALISTA FORENSE IA (Motor Cognitivo Avanzado) -->
                <div class="relative z-10 mb-10">
                    <div class="liquid-glass p-6 md:p-7">
                        <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 mb-5">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <i data-lucide="brain-circuit" class="w-5 h-5 text-rose-400"></i>
                                <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white">Analista Forense IA</h3>
                                <span class="px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full liquid-chip text-rose-300 text-[10px] font-bold console-font flex items-center gap-1"><span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-rose-400 animate-pulse"></span> Motor Avanzado</span>
                                <span id="forensic-ai-status" class="ai-status-pill ai-offline"><span class="dot"></span>CLAUDE</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <label class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase console-font tracking-wider">Modo</label>
                                <select id="forensic-model" onchange="playClick()" class="bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[11px] focus:outline-none focus:border-rose-500 text-slate-300 transition-colors">
                                    <option value="pericial">🧠 Policial (Máximo rigor)</option>
                                    <option value="equilibrado" selected>✨ Equilibrado</option>
                                    <option value="rapido">⚡ Rápido</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <!-- Entrada del caso -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                                <label class="text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase console-font">Descripción del Caso / Escenario de Evidencia</label>
                                <textarea
                                    id="forensic-scenario"
                                    placeholder="Ej: Se incauta un portátil con Windows 11 y un móvil Android tras una sospecha de filtración de datos. El equipo seguía encendido al llegar..."
                                    class="w-full h-[200px] bg-slate-950/90 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-4 text-xs text-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:border-rose-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-rose-500/30 transition-all leading-relaxed resize-none"
                                ></textarea>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2.5">
                                    <button onclick="executeForensicAI('plan')" class="forensic-directive p-3 bg-rose-500/10 border border-rose-500/25 text-left">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-rose-300">🧭 Plan de Análisis</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Metodología paso a paso.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeForensicAI('tools')" class="forensic-directive p-3 bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/25 text-left">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-cyan-300">🛠️ Herramientas</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Software recomendado.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeForensicAI('custody')" class="forensic-directive p-3 bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/25 text-left">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-amber-300">📋 Cadena de Custodia</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Checklist de preservación.</p>
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="executeForensicAI('osint')" class="forensic-directive p-3 bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/25 text-left">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-xs text-emerald-300">🌐 Vía OSINT</div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Investigación de fuentes abiertas.</p>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Salida del analista -->
                            <div class="border border-slate-800 rounded-xl bg-[#030611] overflow-hidden flex flex-col min-h-[300px]">
                                <div class="bg-slate-900/60 px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold console-font tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                        <i data-lucide="file-text" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-rose-400"></i> INFORME POLICIAL GENERADO
                                    </span>
                                    <button id="btn-copy-forensic" onclick="copyForensicResult(); playClick();" disabled class="p-1.5 hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded border border-transparent disabled:opacity-30 transition-all">
                                        <i data-lucide="copy" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-5 overflow-y-auto max-h-[320px] flex-grow text-left">
                                    <div id="forensic-loader" class="hidden flex-col items-center justify-center py-12">
                                        <i data-lucide="loader-2" class="w-6 h-6 text-rose-400 animate-spin mb-2"></i>
                                        <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">El analista forense está procesando el expediente...</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div id="forensic-idle" class="text-slate-500 text-xs italic text-center py-12">
                                        Describe el caso y selecciona una directiva. El analista emitirá un informe estructurado en formato policial.
                                    </div>
                                    <div id="forensic-output" class="prose max-w-none hidden"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- RECURSOS WEB OFICIALES + GLOSARIO -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 relative z-10 mb-8">

                    <!-- Recursos Web Oficiales -->
                    <div>
                        <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <i data-lucide="globe-lock" class="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                            Recursos Web Forenses & Policiales
                        </h3>

                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <!-- Policía & Agencias -->
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest console-font">Policía & Agencias</span>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mt-2">
                                    <a href="https://www.interpol.int" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🌍 INTERPOL <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Cooperación policial mundial</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.europol.europa.eu" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🇪🇺 Europol <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Ciberdelito (informe IOCTA)</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.policia.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🛡️ Policía Nacional <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— España</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.guardiacivil.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🦅 Guardia Civil <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Grupo de Delitos Telemáticos</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.fbi.gov" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🇺🇸 FBI <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Cyber Division & IC3</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Ciencia Forense & Estándares -->
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-amber-400 font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest console-font">Ciencia Forense & Estándares</span>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mt-2">
                                    <a href="https://enfsi.eu" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🔬 ENFSI <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Red Europea de Institutos Forenses</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.nist.gov" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">📐 NIST <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Estándares y guías forenses</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.mjusticia.gob.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">⚗️ INTCF <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Toxicología y Ciencias Forenses</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.incibe.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🔐 INCIBE <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Ciberseguridad (España)</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.ccn-cert.cni.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🛰️ CCN-CERT <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Respuesta a incidentes</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- OSINT & Inteligencia -->
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest console-font">OSINT & Inteligencia</span>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 mt-2">
                                    <a href="https://www.virustotal.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🦠 VirusTotal <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Análisis de malware y URLs</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://www.shodan.io" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">📡 Shodan <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Buscador de dispositivos expuestos</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                    <a href="https://haveibeenpwned.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resource-row liquid-glass px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between" onclick="playClick()">
                                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">🔓 Have I Been Pwned <span class="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">— Filtraciones de credenciales</span></span>
                                        <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-cyan-400"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Glosario + Test Forense -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col gap-6">
                        <!-- Glosario Forense -->
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                                <i data-lucide="book-marked" class="w-5 h-5 text-rose-400"></i>
                                Glosario Pericial
                            </h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 max-h-[260px] overflow-y-auto pr-2">
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Cadena de Custodia]</strong> Documentación íntegra del manejo de una evidencia desde su recogida hasta el juicio, garantizando que no fue alterada.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Adquisición Forense]</strong> Copia bit a bit (imagen) de un soporte preservando el original mediante bloqueadores de escritura.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Hash / Integridad]</strong> Huella digital (MD5 / SHA-256) que verifica matemáticamente que la evidencia no ha cambiado.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Dactiloscopia]</strong> Identificación de personas a través del estudio de las crestas papilares de las huellas dactilares.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Informe Pericial]</strong> Documento técnico-legal emitido por un perito que expone hallazgos, método y conclusiones ante un tribunal.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[Artefacto Volátil]</strong> Dato presente solo en memoria RAM (procesos, conexiones, claves) que se pierde al apagar el equipo.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[IOC]</strong> Indicador de Compromiso: rastro (hash, IP, dominio) que evidencia una intrusión o actividad maliciosa.
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-2.5 liquid-glass text-[11px]">
                                    <strong class="text-rose-400 font-mono">[ISO 27037]</strong> Norma internacional de directrices para la identificación, recogida y preservación de evidencia digital.
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Test Forense -->
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-wider uppercase mb-2 console-font">Test Forense (6 Qs - Pulsa para revelar)</h3>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 max-h-[200px] overflow-y-auto pr-2">
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">1. ¿Qué garantiza la cadena de custodia?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">La integridad y trazabilidad de la prueba.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">2. ¿Qué algoritmo verifica integridad?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">Funciones hash (SHA-256, MD5).</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">3. ¿Herramienta para forense de RAM?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">Volatility Framework.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">4. ¿Qué evita un bloqueador de escritura?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">Modificar el original al adquirirlo.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">5. ¿Qué es OSINT?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">Inteligencia de fuentes abiertas.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-3 liquid-glass cursor-pointer text-left" onclick="this.classList.toggle('revealed-ans'); playClick();">
                                    <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-200">6. ¿Norma de evidencia digital?</p>
                                    <p class="ans-text text-[10px] text-rose-400 font-mono mt-1">ISO/IEC 27037.</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CONSOLA DE DIAGNÓSTICO (Terminal) -->
        <section id="console-box" class="mb-14">
            <div class="glass-panel p-6 relative overflow-hidden">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-800 pb-3 mb-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-red-500"></span>
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-yellow-500"></span>
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-green-500"></span>
                        <span class="text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-slate-400 console-font ml-2">UNAI_CYBER_TERMINAL_V3.8</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-[10px] text-cyan-400 font-bold console-font">ESTADO: ONLINE</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Cuerpo de la Consola -->
                <div class="bg-black/80 rounded-xl p-5 border border-slate-800 min-h-[160px] console-font text-xs text-slate-300 flex flex-col justify-between font-mono">
                    <div id="consoleText" class="space-y-1 overflow-y-auto max-h-[120px] text-left">
                        <p class="text-slate-500">&gt; Iniciando terminal forense en el IES Benalmádena...</p>
                        <p class="text-cyan-400">&gt; Conexión de puertos de telemetría completa.</p>
                        <p class="text-white">&gt; Bienvenido a los expedientes unificados. Usa las acciones de abajo para inyectar scripts en la consola o interactúa con los simuladores de arriba.</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Botones de Acción de la Consola -->
                    <div class="mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-800/80 flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-start">
                        <button onclick="runConsoleCommand('syslog')" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all hover:border-cyan-500/40">
                            run syslog.sh
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="runConsoleCommand('pc-bench')" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all hover:border-purple-500/40">
                            run setup_bench.sh
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="runConsoleCommand('bio-extract')" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all hover:border-green-500/40">
                            run bio_database.sh
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="runConsoleCommand('invenio-core')" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all hover:border-blue-500/40">
                            run invenio_core.sh
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="runConsoleCommand('clear')" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all hover:border-red-500/40">
                            clear logs
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

    </main>

    <footer class="mx-auto py-8 px-4 border-t border-slate-900 text-center text-xs text-slate-500 console-font flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4" style="max-width: 1480px;">
        <div>
            <span>Diseñado con pasión por Unai · Investigador & Desarrollador</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-3">
            <span class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('invenio-section')">Invenio Labs</span>
            <span class="hidden sm:inline">·</span>
            <span class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('setup-section')">Setup PC 2.0</span>
            <span class="hidden sm:inline">·</span>
            <span class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('bio-section')">Base Biològica v3</span>
            <span class="hidden sm:inline">·</span>
            <span class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('notes-section')">Notas IA</span>
            <span class="hidden sm:inline">·</span>
            <span class="hover:text-rose-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('forensic-section')">Criminología Forense</span>
            <span class="hidden sm:inline">·</span>
            <span class="hover:text-emerald-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer" onclick="scrollToSection('auth-section')">Acceso Seguro</span>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- Script de Inicialización y Lógica Expandida -->
    <script>

        /* ============================================================
           ✦ MOTOR DE IA REAL — Anthropic Claude (funciona en artifacts) ✦
           Antes los 3 sistemas llamaban a Gemini con API key vacía y SOLO
           mostraban texto enlatado. Ahora hablan con Claude de verdad,
           con efecto de streaming, citas web y degradación elegante.
           ============================================================ */
        const CLAUDE_MODEL = "claude-sonnet-4-20250514";
        const CLAUDE_ENDPOINT = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages";
        let aiOnline = null; // null = sin probar, true = en línea, false = offline

        // Acceso seguro a localStorage (degrada con elegancia en modo privado / file://)
        function lsGet(k) { try { return localStorage.getItem(k); } catch (e) { return null; } }
        function lsSet(k, v) { try { localStorage.setItem(k, v); } catch (e) {} }

        // Convierte el historial estilo Gemini ({role:'model'|'user', parts:[{text}]})
        // al formato de Anthropic, garantizando alternancia y arranque en 'user'.
        function toAnthropicMessages(history) {
            let msgs = history.map(m => ({
                role: m.role === "model" ? "assistant" : "user",
                content: (m.parts || []).map(p => p.text).join("\n").trim()
            })).filter(m => m.content.length);
            while (msgs.length && msgs[0].role === "assistant") msgs.shift();
            const merged = [];
            for (const m of msgs) {
                const last = merged[merged.length - 1];
                if (last && last.role === m.role) last.content += "\n\n" + m.content;
                else merged.push({ role: m.role, content: m.content });
            }
            if (merged.length && merged[merged.length - 1].role !== "user") {
                merged.push({ role: "user", content: "(continúa)" });
            }
            return merged;
        }

        // Llamada central a Claude. Devuelve { text, sources }.
        /* ============================================================
           ✦ AMPLIACIÓN NX — Conexión REAL con Google (Gemini) ✦
           Capa de configuración + cliente Gemini con búsqueda web real
           (grounding con Google Search) + despachador que decide el
           proveedor sin romper ninguna de las llamadas existentes.
           ============================================================ */

        // --- Configuración de IA persistida en localStorage ---
        const NX_AI_KEYS = {
            provider: 'ai_provider',     // 'auto' | 'gemini' | 'anthropic'
            geminiKey: 'gemini_key',
            geminiModel: 'gemini_model',
            clientId: 'google_client_id'
        };
        function getAICfg() {
            return {
                provider: lsGet(NX_AI_KEYS.provider) || 'auto',
                geminiKey: (lsGet(NX_AI_KEYS.geminiKey) || '').trim(),
                geminiModel: lsGet(NX_AI_KEYS.geminiModel) || 'gemini-2.5-flash',
                clientId: (lsGet(NX_AI_KEYS.clientId) || '').trim()
            };
        }
        function setAICfg(patch) {
            if (!patch) return getAICfg();
            if ('provider' in patch) lsSet(NX_AI_KEYS.provider, patch.provider || 'auto');
            if ('geminiKey' in patch) lsSet(NX_AI_KEYS.geminiKey, (patch.geminiKey || '').trim());
            if ('geminiModel' in patch) lsSet(NX_AI_KEYS.geminiModel, patch.geminiModel || 'gemini-2.5-flash');
            if ('clientId' in patch) lsSet(NX_AI_KEYS.clientId, (patch.clientId || '').trim());
            return getAICfg();
        }
        // ¿Qué proveedor toca usar de verdad?
        function nxResolveProvider() {
            const c = getAICfg();
            if (c.provider === 'gemini') return 'gemini';
            if (c.provider === 'anthropic') return 'anthropic';
            // auto: si hay clave Gemini la usamos (conexión Google real); si no, Anthropic.
            return c.geminiKey ? 'gemini' : 'anthropic';
        }

        // Convierte mensajes estilo Anthropic [{role:'user'|'assistant',content}]
        // a 'contents' de Gemini [{role:'user'|'model',parts:[{text}]}].
        function nxToGeminiContents(messages) {
            return (messages || [])
                .map(m => ({
                    role: m.role === 'assistant' ? 'model' : 'user',
                    parts: [{ text: typeof m.content === 'string' ? m.content : (m.content || []).map(b => b.text || '').join('\n') }]
                }))
                .filter(c => c.parts[0].text && c.parts[0].text.length);
        }

        // --- Cliente Gemini REAL (Google) — devuelve { text, sources } ---
        async function callGemini({ system, messages, maxTokens = 2048, useWebSearch = false }) {
            const cfg = getAICfg();
            if (!cfg.geminiKey) {
                throw new Error('Falta la clave de Google AI Studio. Ábrela en ⚙ Ajustes de IA y pega tu clave gratuita.');
            }
            const model = cfg.geminiModel || 'gemini-2.5-flash';
            const endpoint = 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/' + encodeURIComponent(model) + ':generateContent';
            const contents = nxToGeminiContents(messages);

            function buildBody(searchToolKind) {
                const body = {
                    contents,
                    generationConfig: { maxOutputTokens: maxTokens, temperature: 0.8 }
                };
                if (system) body.system_instruction = { parts: [{ text: system }] };
                if (useWebSearch && searchToolKind === 'modern') body.tools = [{ google_search: {} }];
                else if (useWebSearch && searchToolKind === 'legacy') body.tools = [{ google_search_retrieval: {} }];
                return body;
            }

            async function doFetch(searchToolKind) {
                return fetch(endpoint, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-goog-api-key': cfg.geminiKey },
                    body: JSON.stringify(buildBody(searchToolKind))
                });
            }

            // 1er intento: herramienta moderna (google_search). Si el modelo es
            // antiguo y la rechaza, reintentamos con google_search_retrieval.
            let response = await doFetch(useWebSearch ? 'modern' : 'none');
            if (!response.ok && useWebSearch && (response.status === 400 || response.status === 404)) {
                let probe = '';
                try { probe = await response.clone().text(); } catch (e) {}
                if (/google_search|tool|unknown|unsupported|retrieval/i.test(probe)) {
                    response = await doFetch('legacy');
                }
            }
            if (!response.ok) {
                let detail = '';
                try { detail = await response.text(); } catch (e) {}
                let hint = '';
                if (response.status === 400 && /API_KEY_INVALID|API key not valid/i.test(detail)) hint = ' (clave inválida — revísala en ⚙ Ajustes de IA)';
                else if (response.status === 403) hint = ' (clave sin permisos o API no habilitada)';
                else if (response.status === 429) hint = ' (límite de cuota alcanzado, prueba en un minuto)';
                throw new Error('Gemini HTTP ' + response.status + hint + ' :: ' + detail.slice(0, 200));
            }
            const data = await response.json();
            let text = '';
            const sources = [];
            const seen = new Set();
            const cand = data && data.candidates && data.candidates[0];
            if (cand && cand.content && Array.isArray(cand.content.parts)) {
                text = cand.content.parts.map(p => p.text || '').join('');
            }
            const gm = cand && cand.groundingMetadata;
            if (gm && Array.isArray(gm.groundingChunks)) {
                for (const ch of gm.groundingChunks) {
                    const w = ch && ch.web;
                    if (w && w.uri && !seen.has(w.uri)) { seen.add(w.uri); sources.push({ uri: w.uri, title: w.title || w.uri }); }
                }
            }
            if (!text && cand && cand.finishReason && cand.finishReason !== 'STOP') {
                text = '⚠️ La respuesta se detuvo (' + cand.finishReason + '). Reformula o reduce la petición.';
            }
            aiOnline = true;
            return { text: (text || '').trim(), sources };
        }

        // --- DESPACHADOR: este es el nuevo callClaude que usan TODOS los módulos ---
        // Decide entre Gemini (Google real) y Anthropic, manteniendo la misma firma
        // y el mismo formato de retorno { text, sources }. Cero cambios en las llamadas.
        async function callClaude(opts) {
            const provider = nxResolveProvider();
            if (provider === 'gemini') {
                try {
                    return await callGemini(opts);
                } catch (err) {
                    // En modo 'auto' intentamos Anthropic como red de seguridad
                    // (útil si el portal se abre dentro de Claude).
                    if (getAICfg().provider === 'auto') {
                        try { return await callAnthropic(opts); } catch (e2) { /* propaga el original */ }
                    }
                    throw err;
                }
            }
            return await callAnthropic(opts);
        }

        // Exponemos utilidades para el panel de ajustes (script independiente).
        window.getAICfg = getAICfg;
        window.setAICfg = setAICfg;
        window.callGemini = callGemini;
        window.callClaude = callClaude;
        window.nxResolveProvider = nxResolveProvider;

        async function callAnthropic({ system, messages, maxTokens = 2048, useWebSearch = false }) {
            const body = { model: CLAUDE_MODEL, max_tokens: maxTokens, messages };
            if (system) body.system = system;
            if (useWebSearch) body.tools = [{ type: "web_search_20250305", name: "web_search", max_uses: 5 }];

            const response = await fetch(CLAUDE_ENDPOINT, {
                method: "POST",
                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            });
            if (!response.ok) {
